schema.name: CiscoUmbrellaZeroTrustAccess_CL
schema.description: The Cisco Secure Access Zero Trust Access logs show your organization's traffic through the Secure Access Zero Trust Access services. ZTA logs include traffic events that take place at the time of ZTA session authentication for both client-based and browser-based ZTA sessions.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The date and time of the ZTA event, expressed as a UTC-formatted string.

columns.name: IdentityEmail
columns.description: The email address of the Active Directory user.

columns.name: IdentityLabels
columns.description: The list of labels for the identity.

columns.name: IdentityTypeLabels
columns.description: The label of the identity type.

columns.name: HostName
columns.description: The hostname of the user device.

columns.name: Verdict
columns.description: Whether the user has access to a resource.

columns.name: ClientOs
columns.description: The operating system of the user device.

columns.name: ClientBrowser
columns.description: The name of the browser on the user device.

columns.name: ClientGeoLocation
columns.description: The regional location of the user device.

columns.name: ClientIp
columns.description: The IP address of the user device.

columns.name: RulesetId
columns.description: The ID of the ruleset.

columns.name: RuleId
columns.description: The ID of the access rule.

columns.name: PrivateAppGroupId
columns.description: The ID of the private application group.

columns.name: PrivateAppId
columns.description: The ID of the private application.

columns.name: PrivateResourceId
columns.description: The ID that Secure Access assigns to the customer-defined private application.

columns.name: PrivateResourceGroupId
columns.description: The ID if the rule matched is based on the private application group.

columns.name: StepUpAuthType
columns.description: The type of authentication. Valid values are: SAML_SSO, MFA, or NONE.

columns.name: StepUpAuthResult
columns.description: The result of the authentication. Valid values are: SUCCESS or FAILURE.

columns.name: StepUpAuthTokenLife
columns.description: The time in seconds between when you generated the token and used the token.

columns.name: PostureId
columns.description: ID of the matching posture profile.

columns.name: RequestedIdFqdn
columns.description: The IP or FQDN of the requested application.

columns.name: ResolvedIp
columns.description: The IP of the application returned by the proxy.

columns.name: AppConnectorGroupId
columns.description: The group ID of the App Connector.

columns.name: HeadendType
columns.description: The type of the headend. Valid values are: CLAP or BAP.

columns.name: DuoDeviceId
columns.description: The ID of the Duo App on the device.

columns.name: DuoDeviceIdString
columns.description: The ID label of the Duo App on the device.

columns.name: SystemPassword
columns.description: Whether the system password is enabled with its timeout in seconds.

columns.name: ClientFirewall
columns.description: The client system firewall. Valid values are SYS or NONE.

columns.name: DiskEncryption
columns.description: The client Disk Encryption Type. Valid values are: SYS, NONE or THIRD PARTY.

columns.name: AntiMalwareAgents
columns.description: The clients' anti malware agents.

columns.name: TransactionId
columns.description: A unique identifier generated by the Secure Client for each network request.

columns.name: BlockReason
columns.description: The reason for the transaction being blocked.

columns.name: ApplicationPort
columns.description: The port of the destination application.

columns.name: ApplicationProtocol
columns.description: The type of protocol used for transactions.

columns.name: TunnelType
columns.description: The type of tunnel used to connect to the ZTA proxy.

columns.name: SecureClientVersion
columns.description: The version of the Cisco Secure Client on the endpoint device accessing a private resource.

columns.name: PossibleMatchRulesetId
columns.description: For a block event, the ID of the ruleset that could have allowed the transaction if not for the block reason.

columns.name: PossibleMatchRuleId
columns.description: For a block event, the ID of the rule within the ruleset that could have allowed the transaction if not for the block reason.

columns.name: PossibleMatchPosture
columns.description: For a block event, the posture that could have allowed the transaction if not for the block reason.

columns.name: SourceProcessId
columns.description: The ID of the source process that initiated the transaction from the client side..

columns.name: SourceProcessName
columns.description: The name of the source process that initiated the transaction from the client side (e.g., chrome.exe).

columns.name: SourceProcessHash
columns.description: The hash of the source process that initiated the transaction from the client side.

columns.name: SourceProcessUserName
columns.description: The user name associated with the source process that initiated the transaction from the client side.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The Secure Access organization ID.

columns.name: AdJoinedId
columns.description: ID of the device if it is joined to an Active Directory domain.

columns.name: EnforcedBy
columns.description: The Secure Access component or service that enforced the policy or control related to this event (e.g., Firewall, Web Proxy).

columns.name: FtdEnforcementId
columns.description: The unique identifier of the enforcement action taken by a Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) device integrated with Secure Access.

columns.name: FtdEnforcementName
columns.description: The name or type of enforcement action taken by a Cisco Secure Firewall Threat Defense device that is integrated with Secure Access, for example, Malware Block and URL Category Block.

columns.name: MdmSource
columns.description: The specific Mobile Device Manager (MDM) platform integrated with Secure Access providing device management and compliance information.

columns.name: MdmDeviceId
columns.description: The unique identifier assigned to the device by the integrated MDM platform, enabling Secure Access to track and manage the device's access privileges.

columns.name: MdmIsManaged
columns.description: Indicates whether the device is currently under active management by the integrated MDM platform: TRUE or FALSE.

columns.name: MdmIsCompliant
columns.description: Indicates whether the device meets the compliance policies defined within the integrated MDM platform: TRUE or FALSE.

columns.name: MdmLastUpdated
columns.description: The date and time that Secure Access last received updated device information from the integrated MDM platform.

columns.name: TrustedNetwork
columns.description: The trusted network that was applied during policy enforcement.

columns.name: DetectedTrustedNetworks
columns.description: A list of trusted networks that were detected by the client during the event.

columns.name: ZtaProfileId
columns.description: The unique identifier of the applicable ZTA profile associated with the event.

columns.name: EgressIp
columns.description: The public IP address assigned to a session as it exits the Secure Access ZTA infrastructure en route to the destination application.
